Class AppNotification

java.lang.Object
com.example.codebase.AppNotification
public class AppNotification extends Object
Represents a lottery notification stored in Firestore. Each notification is written by the organizer and read by the entrant. Documents are stored at: notifications/{deviceId}/messages/{autoId} The read flag is set to false on creation and updated to true once the entrant has viewed the notification.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AppNotification()
    Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.

  • Constructor Details

    • AppNotification

      public AppNotification()
      Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization. Do not use directly — Firestore calls this when mapping documents to AppNotification objects via toObject().

  • Method Details

    • getNotificationId

      public String getNotificationId()
      Returns the unique notification document ID.
      Returns:
      the notification ID, or null if not set

    • setNotificationId

      public void setNotificationId(String notificationId)
      Sets the unique notification document ID.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - the Firestore document ID for this notification

    • getUserId

      public String getUserId()
      Returns the device ID of the entrant this notification was sent to.
      Returns:
      the user/device ID, or null if not set

    • setUserId

      public void setUserId(String userId)
      Sets the device ID of the entrant this notification was sent to.
      Parameters:
      userId - the entrant's device ID

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the Firestore document ID of the related event.
      Returns:
      the event ID, or null if not set

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Sets the Firestore document ID of the related event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the event document ID

    • getEventTitle

      public String getEventTitle()
      Returns the display title of the related event.
      Returns:
      the event title, or null if not set

    • setEventTitle

      public void setEventTitle(String eventTitle)
      Sets the display title of the related event.
      Parameters:
      eventTitle - the event title to display

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the subject line of the notification.
      Returns:
      the notification title/subject, or null if not set

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets the subject line of the notification.
      Parameters:
      title - the notification subject line

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns the body text of the notification.
      Returns:
      the notification message body, or null if not set

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(String message)
      Sets the body text of the notification.
      Parameters:
      message - the notification message body

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the lottery outcome status for this notification. Expected values: "Selected", "Cancelled", or "Waiting List".
      Returns:
      the status string, or null if not set

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the lottery outcome status for this notification.
      Parameters:
      status - the outcome status e.g. "Selected"

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the recipient group type this notification was sent to. Expected values: "selectedEntrants", "cancelledEntrants", or "waitingList".
      Returns:
      the type string, or null if not set

    • setType

      public void setType(String type)
      Sets the recipient group type this notification was sent to.
      Parameters:
      type - the recipient group type

    • isRead

      public boolean isRead()
      Returns whether the entrant has read this notification.
      Returns:
      true if the notification has been read, false otherwise

    • setRead

      public void setRead(boolean read)
      Sets the read state of this notification. Should be set to true once the entrant has viewed it.
      Parameters:
      read - true to mark as read, false to mark as unread
